data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Waitlist with priority bidding', but the evidence provided does not include any checks or implementations related to this specific functionality. While there is evidence of a customer entering a waitlist/queue flow, it does not confirm the existence of a priority bidding mechanism, indicating a clear gap in the implementation of the specified requirement. The absence of any details or validations regarding priority bidding directly supports the conclusion of a gap.
gaps: No evidence of priority bidding mechanism implementation or validation.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the 'Waitlist with priority bidding' requirement.
